title: Cold-Outreach Disqualification For Follow-Through Insights
summary: Implemented cold-outreach disqualification for Gmail follow-through insights by adding thread engagement context, explicit positive and negative evidence fields, deterministic suppression of clear outbound sales sequences before the LLM, a stricter reply-obligation gate after the LLM, durable sales-outreach preference memory coverage, and a regression test for the Ayoub/Outly-style false positive.
next_action: Deploy and monitor production Gmail follow-through insights to confirm cold outreach stays out of Telegram while engaged external threads still surface.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-03-15 after implementing Gmail cold-outreach suppression, requiring both positive and negative reply-owed evidence in the LLM contract, tightening post-LLM acceptance so ambiguous or disqualified outreach cannot persist as actionable insight rows, extending durable preference memory for `sales_outreach` and `cold_outreach`, and adding a regression test for the Ayoub/Outly sequence.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the cold-outreach disqualification flow end to end and passed the full repo verification gate.
open_questions: Whether `digest` should become a first-class persisted queue instead of mapping to non-persistence in the current pipeline
Whether Telegram staging should enforce `sales_outreach` and `cold_outreach` content filters synchronously in a later pass
resume_context.notes: The implementation now treats clear outbound sales sequences as disqualifying unless the operator already engaged or made an explicit commitment, carries structured `evidence_for_reply_owed` and `evidence_against_reply_owed` metadata through the Gmail follow-through pipeline, and teaches preference memory to capture durable `sales_outreach` and `cold_outreach` suppression rules.

history.note: Drafted a Spectacula spec for disqualifying cold outreach before Gmail follow-through insights can become actionable.

Implementation began for Gmail triage hints, conversation-context engagement fields, prompt contract changes, deterministic disqualification, durable preference-memory support, and regression coverage.
Completed the cold-outreach disqualification feature, passed `mix precommit`, and recorded the shipped behavior in the done-stage Spectacula manifest.
